errors.message: The ending scene 'scene-7-resolution-tentative' is a fully reachable terminal scene (via choice-4 option 'b' and choice-4b option 'a') but has no corresponding entry in the top-level 'outcomes' array and no 'branchDialogue' variant. All three other endings (friendship, lonely-win, broken) have documented outcomes and branch-specific dialogue; this ending is undocumented, meaning analytics/trait-summary tooling and any ending-specific dialogue variation will silently fail to identify or narrate this path correctly.
errors.expectedValue: An outcome entry (e.g. 'branch-cautious-progress') with triggeredBy paths resolving to scene-7-resolution-tentative, plus a matching branchDialogue block
errors.actualValue: No outcome or branchDialogue references scene-7-resolution-tentative
errors.fix: Add an outcome object describing the path(s) that lead to scene-7-resolution-tentative (e.g. choice-1:a/b, choice-2:a, choice-3:a, choice-4:b OR choice-3b:a, choice-4b:a) and add a branchDialogue entry for flavor text specific to that ending.

warnings.message: Dialogue line has an empty 'text' field, relying entirely on the 'action' field. Depending on the renderer, this could produce an empty speech bubble for Jordan.
warnings.suggestion: Either give this line minimal text (e.g. a laugh interjection like 'Ha—') or mark it explicitly as an action-only beat (e.g. character: NARRATOR) so renderers don't attempt to draw an empty bubble for Jordan.

warnings.message: Only 4 of the many possible choice-path permutations (2^4=16 combinations across choice-1/2(2b)/3(3b)/4(4b/4c)) are documented as named outcomes. This is likely an intentional design choice to highlight archetypal paths, but it means most actual playthroughs will not match any outcome's triggeredBy list exactly.
warnings.suggestion: Either document all reachable path clusters or explicitly state in outcome descriptions that these are representative archetypes rather than exhaustive, so downstream trait-scoring logic derives outcome from ending scene rather than exact triggeredBy match.

warnings.message: Episode's seasonId 'season-1' does not textually mirror the world's season label 'Season 1: First Year' — not a functional bug given seasons are plain strings in the world schema, but worth aligning naming conventions for readability.
warnings.suggestion: Consider a naming convention doc (e.g. season-1 always maps to the first string in world.seasons) to avoid ambiguity in multi-season worlds.

warnings.message: estimatedPlayTime of 12 minutes seems low given 15 scenes with substantial dialogue and 8 choice points; players reading all dialogue plus choice deliberation may take longer.
warnings.suggestion: Re-time via a playtest pass and adjust if needed; not a blocking issue.

warnings.message: scene-6-showdown-solid and scene-6-showdown-strained/fractured list 'mr-alvarez' and other characters in their 'characters' array who never speak or are referenced in that scene's dialogue (e.g. mr-alvarez in showdown scenes, jordan in scene-3b/scene-5). This is consistent with 'present but silent' staging, but worth a pass to confirm each listed character is intentionally silent rather than an oversight.
warnings.suggestion: Add a brief silent-reaction beat or confirm intentional omission in scene notes.

recommendations: Add an outcome + branchDialogue entry for scene-7-resolution-tentative to fully close the documentation loop on all reachable endings.

Run a full path-traversal simulation (all 2^4 combinations) programmatically to confirm every combination resolves to one of the four ending scenes without dead ends — the manual trace here found no dead ends, but automated coverage would catch this earlier next time.
Consider giving Jordan's empty-text reaction line in scene-6-showdown-solid actual text for renderer safety.
Document that 'outcomes' represent archetypal paths rather than exhaustive branch coverage, to set correct expectations for analytics tooling.
